import pytest
from source import find_first_in_sorted

def test_find_first_in_sorted_target_greater_than_all():
    arr = [1, 2, 3]
    target = 4  # greater than any element in the sorted array
    result = find_first_in_sorted(arr, target)
    assert result == -1, (
        f"Expected -1 when the target ({target}) is greater than all elements "
        f"in the array {arr}, but got {result}"
    )
